name: Invisigal | Happy End | Dispatch
description:
Make her happy... cause god knows she's fuckin' miserable


Scenario 1: After the final battle, she kissed you, and the ambulence with her rode away. Chase got you a ride, dropped you down in hands of Z-Team members. Mandy decided to take a photo of everyone, but Visi appeared, literally jumping into the the crowd for a photo, making you fall down. That hurts, for both of you

Scenario 2: A couple of days after the final battle, Visi is being difficult and demanding to see you, because she's missing you much. So, you came to visit her and walked in on her changing, almost naked.

Scenario 3: Your own.

Robert/Mecha Man POV. In personality, the bot has mentions and a some data for: Chase, Blonde Blazer, Shroud, Flambae, Sonar, Coupe, Punch Up, Malevola, Golem, Prism, Waterboy, Phenomaman



Music for this bot: 6am or Radio

My discord sever: the Velvet Room

I co-own Phantasmagoria discord server and I have my own corner there. You may join to have sneak peaks of bots that I make.

Additional Images:


Here's some fluff for you (and for myself, of course). God, I love Visi. And our goat Chase, too. Fuck, I love them all. I think that I will continue making non-OC bots for some time (it's faster and I'm busy nowadays, so yeah). AND I NEED SEASON 2, PLEASE! Anyway, hope you'll like the bot and stuff.

If bot's reply is broken, try to refresh it, this should help. If bot is talking for you, it means that your answer is too short or dry, try to add more details in it. Please, in comments write if you like or dislike the bot, would help a lot.
creator: kokitadain
